rules.rule_text:
title: Commonly Abused File Hosting Services
id: 15e4317b-76db-4a6e-b0f0-c122ccdba3c5
description: Commonly abused file hosting services utilized to host malicious payloads
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
references:
- https://www.securonix.com/blog/threat-labs-security-advisory-new-starkvortex-attack-campaign-threat-actors-use-drone-manual-lures-to-deliver-merlinagent-payloads/
- https://www.rnbo.gov.ua/files/2023_YEAR/CYBERCENTER/november/APT29%20attacks%20Embassies%20using%20CVE-2023-38831%20-%20report%20en.pdf
date: '2023-11-22'
modified: '2023-12-04'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
  - url|startswith:
    - https://files.catbox.moe/
  - cs-host|endswith:
    - .ngrok-free.app
    - .ngrok-free.dev
    - .ngrok.io
  filter:
  - url|endswith:
    - .webp
  - cs-host:
    - c16d-35-240-187-111.ngrok.io
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Legitimate downloads
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial_access
